subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Our presence unto him who hath been illumined by the splendors of his Lord's light and hath become a stranger to his homeland [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدنا الی الذی استشرق من بوارق انوار ربه و استغرب عن الاوطان
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
